verse.name: v1
verse.lines: How you emphasize the word of God and how you reminiscing the past which full of chaos and now I realized of how I overcome the past, And so I succeeded because of the Lord's grace.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: In every trial, there is a light that gives me strength, The Lord is our strength, the Lord is our strength the Lord is our strength.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In the midst of the storm, I found my way, And with every step, I left my doubts astray. The Lord’s guidance led me through the night, And now I see the light, shining so bright.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Through the trials and tribulations, I found my faith, And with every step, I left my fears astray. The Lord's grace and love, they lifted me up, And now I see the light, shining from above.
